x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Application health data enables DEX AI to diagnose app-specific issues such as Zoom quality and Office 365 performance. Without application monitoring, DEX AI diagnosis is limited to OS-level signals only.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_name: KB Articles with Raw URLs in Body
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Replace URL-dependent content with inline text — summarize what the link contains directly in the article body. Now Assist cannot follow hyperlinks. Target: ≤20% of published articles containing raw URLs.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4603a33acfd903108935fb251d851c06
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Application health data enables DEX AI to diagnose app-specific issues such as Zoom quality and Office 365 performance. Without application monitoring, DEX AI diagnosis is limited to OS-level signals only.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>KB Articles with Raw URLs in Body</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('kb_knowledge');
    gaTotal.addQuery('workflow_state', 'published');
    gaTotal.addQuery('active', true);
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No published KB articles found',
            finding: 'No published KB articles found. URL content check cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var gaURL = new GlideAggregate('kb_knowledge');
    gaURL.addQuery('workflow_state', 'published');
    gaURL.addQuery('active', true);
    gaURL.addQuery('text', 'CONTAINS', 'https://');
    gaURL.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaURL.query();
    var withUrl = gaURL.next() ? parseInt(gaURL.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((withUrl / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = withUrl + ' of ' + total + ' published articles contain raw URLs (' + pct + '%)';

    if (pct <= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of articles contain raw URLs. Now Assist AI Search has predominantly self-contained content that can be summarized without link dependencies.'
        };
    } else if (pct <= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of published articles contain raw URLs (target: ≤20%). Now Assist cannot follow hyperlinks — URL-dependent content will produce incomplete AI summaries.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of published articles rely on raw URLs. Now Assist AI Search cannot follow links — the majority of KB content will produce incomplete AI summaries and poor self-service answers.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>ITSM</module>
<number>CHK0005947</number>
<order>80</order>
<remediation_guidance>Replace URL-dependent content with inline text — summarize what the link contains directly in the article body. Now Assist cannot follow hyperlinks. Target: ≤20% of published articles containing raw URLs.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>4603a33acfd903108935fb251d851c06</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
